message:
test: Update integration tests + add cancel_obligation_invariants

New test file:
- tests/cancel_obligation_invariants.rs: dedicated invariant tests for
  the cancel-obligation interaction boundary

Updated integration tests:
- tests/scheduler_lane_fairness.rs: 225+ lines of new lane fairness
  and cancel priority tests with deterministic scheduling
- tests/e2e_websocket.rs: update for TryFrom<Frame> API change
- tests/golden_outputs.rs: update golden test expectations
- tests/common/mod.rs: shared test helpers updated (20 lines)
- tests/meta/oracle_mutations.rs: oracle mutation test adjustments
- tests/raptorq_conformance.rs: minor cleanup (1 line removed)
- tests/replay_debugging.rs: minor addition (1 line)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
